title: Brad Jones
compiled_truth: Brad Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2001-05-07 to 2002-02-13), Brad Jones sent 17 and received 164 emails, totalling 181 interactions. Top correspondents: [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (9), [Kam Keiser](people/kam-keiser) (5), [Larry May](people/larry-may) (4), [Frank Hayden](people/frank-hayden) (1), [C  Gossett](people/c-gossett) (1). Mailbox folders observed: central, deleted_items, inbox, research, to_do.
